chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.04 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.339/2025 ----------------------------------------------------- 10.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Farooq, advocate for applicants Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------- Learned advocate for applicants does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application on the ground that the trial Court has allowed application under section 248, Cr.PC for withdrawal of direct compliant. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
